title: Imperial News Bureau
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|We've intercepted an Imperial News Bureau bulletin. Thought you might be interested.|General [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]|<ref name="The Isis Coordinates">''[[The Isis Coordinates]]''</ref>}}
The '''Imperial News Bureau''' was an intergalactic holonews organization. [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] posed as a reporter for the Imperial News Bureau while journeying to and exploring [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. This gave him a reasonable credit allowance, and reasons to be carrying a [[Holorecorder/Legends|holorecorder]] and to ask questions without appearing suspicious.

*''[[The Isis Coordinates]]''
